name: Do I really need a lawyer for simple sprained ankle workers comp in Sandy?
description: Maybe not for simple, but yes for denials or complexities to protect full benefits.[2]

mainEntity.name: Do I really need a lawyer for simple sprained ankle workers comp in Sandy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe not for simple, but yes for denials or complexities to protect full benefits.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not always for simple claims, but yes if denied, complex, or third-party involved to maximize benefits and avoid pitfalls.[2][4] Insurers request extensive records; mishandling risks denial.[1] Key factors: (1) Free consult assesses strength; (2) Handles hearings/exams; (3) Pursues third-party for extras; (4) No upfront fees typical.[3] Self-handle basics but get advice if issues arise. Lawyers boost success odds significantly.
